title: Su-Kam Power Systems is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Su-Kam Power Systems is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
